MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DAVE CROW'S MOTION TO STRIKE PRAYER FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES FROM PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Grant, with 10 days leave to amend complaint. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/MJM) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Court Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR #5153
